The Global Crisis

Antimicrobial Resistance is predicted to cause 10 million deaths by 2050.

We close the gap in the agricultural sector by digitizing biological transparency. Biotik creates a direct economic incentive for stewardship.

The Trust Engine

chat_bubble

WhatsApp Logging

Frictionless daily entry for smallholder farmers. No complex apps; just authenticated reporting through familiar interfaces. Secure end-to-end data pipelines.

[09:00] FARMER_ID_442 logged: "No mortality today. Water intake optimal." -> AUTH_HASH: 0x82f...
query_stats

AI Auditor

Biological growth-curve (Cobb 500) triangulation verifies reporting accuracy against natural physiological limits. Discrepancies trigger on-site clinical audits.

Optimal

Verified batches earn a 20% price premium. Compliance is no longer a cost—it is the ultimate competitive advantage in the global health market.
